name: Gilded Painting Camouflage
tip: Crouch behind the golden picture frame and paint deep damask green to blend with the wallpaper around it.

name: Corridor Vase Hideout
tip: Stand beside the tall corridor vase under the party flags; paint cream with green floral speckles.

name: Easter Eggs on the Checkered Floor
tip: Drop into the egg pile on the black-and-white floor; paint a random pastel splotch to blend with the loot.

name: Wall Lamp Shadow Pocket
tip: Wedge into the corner under the wall lamp where the green wallpaper goes nearly black; paint dark charcoal.

name: Staircase Tread Shadow
tip: Climb halfway up the staircase and crouch in the tread shadow; paint dark wood brown.

name: Behind the Leather Sofa
tip: Slip behind the brown leather sofa back; paint reddish-brown to match leather grain.

name: Tablecloth Folds
tip: Hide under the draped tablecloth; paint warm taupe to match the linen fold shadow.

name: Curtain Drop Zone
tip: Press against the floor-length curtain bottom; paint dusty beige to disappear into the fabric pool.

name: Antique Clock Cabinet Top
tip: Hop onto the cabinet beside the antique grandfather clock; paint dark wood with brass speckle.

name: Mirror Frame Edge
tip: Tuck into the gilded mirror frame edge; paint warm gold and stay perfectly still so the reflection sells you out.

name: Cow-Pattern Haystack
tip: Stand next to the spotted cow by the haystack; paint vertical black-and-white stripes to mimic cow hide.

name: Coiled Straw Roll
tip: Curl up inside the rolled hay bale; paint wheat-gold with darker amber streaks.

name: Red Barn Door Shadow
tip: Step behind the red barn door arch; paint deep barn red with darker shadow side.

name: Picket Fence Post
tip: Line up beside a white picket fence post; paint clean off-white with grey weathered edges.

name: Cartoon Cloud Mural
tip: Press against the painted sky mural cloud; paint sky-blue with puffy white blobs.

name: Wooden Crate Stack Gap
tip: Squeeze between stacked wood crates; paint coffee brown to match aged pine.

name: Hot Air Balloon Basket
tip: Hide beneath the hot-air balloon basket; paint bold blue-and-white vertical stripes.

name: Tractor Tire Shadow
tip: Crouch beside the tractor's giant rear tire; paint flat tire-black with subtle tread shadow.

name: Grass-Green Roof Corner
tip: Climb up where the grass meets the shed roof; paint vivid grass-green to dissolve into the lawn.

name: Milk Can Cluster
tip: Tuck inside a group of metal milk cans; paint brushed silver with light dent shadows.

name: Golden Horse Statue Base
tip: Crouch right beside the golden horse statue plinth; paint metallic gold to merge with the bronze.

name: Brick Mortar Pocket
tip: Press into the deeper brick recess; paint warm brick-brown with darker mortar lines.

name: Wooden Beam Shadow
tip: Hang under a heavy ceiling beam; paint deep wood brown with charred shadow accents.

name: Wooden Barrel Side
tip: Hug a wine barrel against the wall; paint red-brown to match aged oak.

name: Red Carpet Pattern
tip: Lie flat on the persian carpet; paint deep red with gold floral swirls.

name: Fireplace Ash Zone
tip: Step into the cold fireplace; paint sooty charcoal with brick edges so you become the ash bed.

name: Stair Tread Side
tip: Sit at the side of a wooden staircase tread; paint mid-brown to match the riser shadow.

name: Antique Candlestick Stand
tip: Stand by the bronze candelabra; paint antique brass with dark wood backdrop.

name: Under the Tavern Bench
tip: Slip under the long oak bench; paint warm grey-brown to match the seat shadow.

name: Hidden Picture Frame
tip: Press behind a wall painting; paint deep red-brown with gold frame highlight.

name: Grand Piano Lacquer
tip: Crouch beside the black-lacquer grand piano; paint pure black with subtle gloss highlight.

name: Crystal Chandelier Stem
tip: Stand under the chandelier stem; paint cream-gold so the falling light wipes you out.

name: Banquet Tablecloth Crease
tip: Lie on the banquet table beside a folded napkin; paint pure white with grey crease shadows.

name: Carved High-Back Chair
tip: Tuck into a high-back carved chair seam; paint deep walnut with darker grain.

name: Stair Ivy Garland
tip: Wrap into the ivy garland down the staircase rail; paint forest-green with dark moss.

name: Party Balloon Cluster
tip: Stand in the party balloon bouquet; paint loud red-and-blue blocks to merge with the balloons.

name: Marble Column Vein
tip: Press against the marble column; paint cream with caramel veining.

name: Window Curtain Shadow
tip: Hide deep inside the heavy velvet curtain fold; paint nearly-black coffee brown.

name: Hallway Sconce Pool
tip: Stop between two hallway sconces; paint medium grey so you sit in the shadow valley.

name: Red Banner Drape
tip: Press against the hanging red banner; paint deep crimson with darker fold shadow.

name: Sleeping-Pose Wall Trick
tip: Lie sideways against the blue floral wall in a sleeping pose; paint dominant blue to flatten yourself into the wallpaper.

name: Red Chaise Armrest
tip: Curl onto the red velvet armrest; paint deep red with darker shadow side.

name: Grey Curtain Pleat
tip: Slip between two grey curtain pleats; paint medium grey with darker fold lines.

name: Coat Rack Silhouette
tip: Stand behind the wooden coat rack; paint dark walnut to merge with the post shadow.

name: Ceiling Lamp Glare
tip: Stand directly under the round ceiling lamp; paint pure lamp-white so the glare swallows you.

name: Blue Floral Wall Corner
tip: Press into the deep corner where two blue wallpaper panels meet; paint navy with darker fold.

name: Mirror Reflection Angle
tip: Stand at the mirror's blind angle; paint cool grey-blue so the reflection treats you as background.

name: Nightstand Side
tip: Crouch beside the wooden nightstand; paint warm chestnut to match drawer fronts.

name: Blue Print Rug Pattern
tip: Sit on the blue floral rug; paint navy with crisp white blooms.

name: Dim Corner Pool
tip: Step into the darkest parlor corner; paint dusk grey-blue to dissolve into the shadow.
